DEFT MOTION TO CONTINUE FILED

/CAL:CLARIFICATION OF SENTENCE/X:COUNSEL STIPULATE THAT DEFENDANT TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED  746 DAYS COUNTY JAIL 372 DAYS SAGE FOR A TOTAL OF 1118 DAYS/NUNCDAT:08-21-08/DEF: HAS SERVED STATE PRISON SENTENCE OF 3 YEARS THE MIDDLE TERM FOR FELONY VIOLATION OF HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11379, PURSUANT TO PC1170(A)(3)/

/CAL:SENTENCING/X:THIS IS A PAPER COMMITMENT,/X:DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED ACCORDING TO NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION (SEE BELOW),/CCC:2150850 & 2307451/DEFTADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REVK/AJW/CH1:SP 3Y:M/CTSP:721/DNA/VF5:200/PAR/CTORD:SENTENCE IS DEEMED SERVED PURSUANT TO PC 1170(A)(3)/PAR11/PAROLE70/PAROLE UNIT2/PARDATE:08-22-08/PAR70/X:*******IMPORTANT NOTE*******/X:AFTER THIS SENTENCE WAS IMPOSED, THE COURT DETERMINED THAT IT IS NOT A VALID SENTENCE BECAUSE THE AMOUNT OF CTS IS NOT ELIGIBLE TO BE A PAPER COMMITMENT; ATTY OSULLIVAN WAS CALLED & THIS CASE IS PLACED BACK ON CALENDAR ON SEPTEMBER 9, 2008 FOR CLARIFICATION OF SENTENCE,/

/CAL:PEOPLE'S MOTION TO REVOKE PROBATION HEARING/X:THIS IS A PAPER COMMITMENT,/X:DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED ACCORDING TO NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION (SEE SENTENCING LINE),/CCC:2150850 & 2307451/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/
/CAL:DA MTR HEARING/MTR-DA/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/X:PROB VIOLATION HEARINGWAIVED FOR TODAY/CONTD:FOR SENTENCING ON PROBATION VIOLATION, TO RUN CONCURRENT WITH #2307451/DOP/
/CAL:PROG REPORTS FROM AA-NA MTGS AND PSY CNSLG REPORTS//CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:DEFT IN COMPLIANCE WITHCOURT ORDER - SEE REPORT FILED/

/CAL:MOT TO ISS BW FAILURE HOME DETENTION//CTORD:FIFTY FIVE DAYS OF HOME DETENTION IMPOSED ON OCTOBER 29, 2004 IS MODIFED AS FOLLOWS:(1) THAT 55 DAYS HOME DETENTION SENTENCE IS VACATED,(2) DEFTTO DO SIXTY DAYS OF AA OR NA MEETINGS, DEFT MUST ATTEND AA OR NA MEETINGSEVERY DAY MONDAY THROUGH SUNDAY AND MUST PROVIDE WRITTEN CONFIRMATION OF ATTENDANCE,/CTORD:DEFT TO CONTINUE WITH DR, LEVY 2X A WEEK AND PROVIDE WRITTEN CONFIRMATION OF ATTENDANCE,/DOP/

/CAL:SUPP RPT APD MTR/MTR-APD/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/PJ:FIFTY FIVE DAYS/ADDL CTS:ZERO//CTORD:DEF TO DO AN ADDITIONAL 55 DAYS ON HOME DETENTION BEGINNING MONDAY NOV 01, 2004, DEFT ORDERED TO REPORT TO HOME DETENTION IMMEDIATELY//CTORD:WHILE ON HOME DETENTION, DEFT MAY APPLY FOR WORK AND MAY GO TO INTERVIEWS AS LONG AS HE IS CLOSELY MONITORED BY HOME DETENTION UNIT,/CTORD:AFTER 55 DAYS ON HOME DETENTION, ONE YEAR SENTENCE DEEMED COMPLETED,/
